_comment: Constraints for narrative-designer when generating card batches. Enforced from cycle 8+.

faction_cycle12_adjustments.druides: CAP at 15% — currently ~31% across 166 templates (over-represented). Max 3 druides cards per 20-card batch.
faction_cycle12_adjustments.ankou: BOOST to 20% minimum — currently under-represented. Min 4 ankou cards per 20-card batch. Prefer mortality/fate/passage themes.
faction_cycle12_adjustments.niamh: Slight boost to 25% — lake/magic/healing themes. Good counterweight to ankou pressure.
